title: An Angel Descends
overview: Cutey Honey comes out of self-imposed exile to battle against Dolmeck's forces, starting with a fight against Death Star.

title: The Sweet Trap of the Jewel Princess
overview: Cutey Honey must defeat the Jewel Princess, who has been kidnapping young women and turning them into statues.

title: A Singing Voice Is the Devil's Temptation
overview: Honey goes undercover to try and find out more about the vials that have been turning her foes into monsters.

title: The Death of Honey? Battle for the Sacred Skyship!
overview: Chokkei has been kidnapped by Dolmeck and his allies, forcing Honey and Chokkei's family to attack Dolmeck's skyship.

title: Challenge! The Fangs of the Evil Sky Monster
overview: Honey must stop Scavenger from triggering a bomb, but Gene and her allies are also after the bomb, and may not have the best of intentions.

title: The Evil of Revenge
overview: Honey and her friends find themselves transported to an run down amusement park, and must survive animated mannequins and Yasha, the woman controlling the mannequins.

title: Prison Is the Nest of Evil
overview: Honey and her allies must go undercover to free Daiko from prison, after she had been taken by Scorpion and her forces.

title: Temptation Shines Like Gold
overview: Gold Digger has stolen a device that can open portals, and is using it to get access to bank vaults to steal all the gold. It is up to Honey and her allies to stop her.
